name: gantt-mind
description: AI-native project plan editor with a Gantt workflow.

scripts.dev:backend: set "UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache"&& set "UV_PYTHON_INSTALL_DIR=.uv-python"&& uv run --project backend uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.backend:lint: set "UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache"&& set "UV_PYTHON_INSTALL_DIR=.uv-python"&& uv run --project backend ruff check backend/app backend/tests
scripts.backend:typecheck: set "UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache"&& set "UV_PYTHON_INSTALL_DIR=.uv-python"&& uv run --project backend mypy backend/app backend/tests
scripts.backend:test: set "UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache"&& set "UV_PYTHON_INSTALL_DIR=.uv-python"&& uv run --project backend pytest backend/tests
scripts.lint: npm run frontend:lint && npm run backend:lint
scripts.typecheck: npm run frontend:typecheck && npm run backend:typecheck
scripts.test: npm run frontend:test && npm run backend:test
